state_analysis: We still don’t have a readable board state. No metadata/FEN found. Terminal renders are too noisy. We can try image preprocessing (binarization/contrast) then OCR to possibly extract any overlaid piece letters or annotations from the image. If anything resembling square-piece letters appears, we can reconstruct the position. Otherwise, we need a different approach.
explanation:
- List directory to see any helper files.
- Use ImageMagick to generate high-contrast variants of the image.
- Run Tesseract OCR with multiple page segmentation modes to extract any text.
- If any text resembling chess notation appears, we’ll parse it and then write the best move(s) to /app/move.txt in a follow-up step.

commands.keystrokes: tesseract board_bw.png stdout --psm 6 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^\s\+//; s/\s\+$//' | sed '/^$/d'
tesseract board_bw2.png stdout --psm 6 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^\s\+//; s/\s\+$//' | sed '/^$/d'
tesseract board_bw3.png stdout --psm 6 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^\s\+//; s/\s\+$//' | sed '/^$/d'
